## User Story

**As a** <!-- role: e.g., Care Manager, Resident, Admin Staff, Family Member -->
**I want to** <!-- goal: what the user wants to do -->
**So that** <!-- benefit: the value or outcome -->

## Story Details

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Story ID** | US-XXX |
| **Epic** | <!-- e.g., Resident Management, Billing, Staff Scheduling --> |
| **Sprint** | |
| **Priority** | <!-- P1 / P2 / P3 / P4 --> |
| **Story Points** | <!-- Estimated complexity: XS / S / M / L / XL --> |
| **Related BRD** | <!-- BRD Section reference --> |

## Acceptance Criteria

```gherkin
GIVEN <initial context>
WHEN <action is taken>
THEN <expected outcome>
```

- [ ] AC-1:
- [ ] AC-2:
- [ ] AC-3:

## UI / Wireframe Reference

<!-- Link to wireframe or describe expected UI behavior -->

## Out of Scope

<!-- Explicitly state what this story does NOT cover -->

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Story is written in standard format
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are testable
- [ ] Linked to BRD requirement
- [ ] Peer reviewed
- [ ] BA Lead approved
